title: What the Frak is All This Shart
display_title: What the Frak is All This Shart
wikitext:
[]: What the Frak is All This Shart?!             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Sep 29, 2007 10:37 pm I've started looking around for terms of interest in the Onegeek archives, and have found some very interesting information that I just can't find anything else about other than a Japanese source that I don't have access to. Most of this information seems to be from Bochan Bird, who, according to Reichu, now hates the Evangelion community(?) Here are some things that I'd like to know more about: -Kaworu was originally going to be "a cat with a little kid". The cat was going to be the Angel. I had read somewhere that he was originally going to be a "catboy", which I had assumed meant like Naota in FLCL's third episode (I think)... so, which one is it? And I'm assuming Kaworu's showing up with a cat in the manga was a reference to that abandoned idea? -Kaworu was going to talk to Shinji and then Gendo about Bruges-la-Morte , which according to Wikipedia, "is notable for its poetic evocation of the decaying city and for its innovative form". So, Kaworu actually spoke to Gendo?! And it says that he tells Gendo "about the Nerv HQ being some kind of "cathedral" he had built for his wife"?! Wait, wait, never mind. I thought it meant Kaworu's wife. I'm sure this means Gendo's wife, as NERV HQ is a place for the Evangelions, one of which is Gendo's wife. -It mentions that the Spear of Longinus's purpose ended up being completely different. What was its original purpose? -Though this wasn't on that site, it's related to Sore wo Nasumono: I still don't know anything about Asuka being a werewolf other than Reichu mentioning something about that long, long ago. Is there anything else available about that? -Sore wo Nasumono apparently mentions "two ancient civilizations" (not one... but two), Arqa (I'm using that spelling now) apparently being one of those. Is there anything else known about that? Were Adam and Lilith originally from separate FARs? -The moon was supposed to have a much more important role and link with Rei (as most of us already know), but does anyone know what Rei's original link with the moon actually was ? One person said that if he had gone to FanimeCon the previous year (2000, apparently), he would have asked Yamaga about Arqa, but he didn't. Now I really wished I had asked him, even though he may not know.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat Sep 29, 2007 10:59 pm What Bochan Bird hates the eva community?? Id be as interested in information on this as the eva stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Sep 29, 2007 11:07 pm According to Reichu, Bochan became frustrated after translating all the episode scripts and everyone just complained.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Sep 29, 2007 11:07 pm DatDude wrote: What Bochan Bird hates the eva community??

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat Sep 29, 2007 11:16 pm depends on the reason

[]:             Quote Post by Apathetic Piggy » Sun Sep 30, 2007 12:00 am BrikHaus wrote: DatDude wrote: What Bochan Bird hates the eva community??

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Sun Sep 30, 2007 2:00 am a cat girl died >wikipedia quote<

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Sep 30, 2007 2:06 am You know that's really not as funny as you seem to think it is. Wiki is great for things with sources, such as the sciences. Just not works of opinion.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Sun Sep 30, 2007 2:27 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: You know that's really not as funny as you seem to think it is. Wiki is great for things with sources, such as the sciences. Just not works of opinion.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Sep 30, 2007 4:58 am that doesn't mean you can quote it or cite it as a source for a school assignment.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Sun Sep 30, 2007 7:45 am Kaworu was meant to be a catboy ... Asuka .. werewolf? What? Does what might have happenenend have any impact on Evangelion canon, really? Also, isn't most of that stuff pretty ridiculous and hard to believe? BrikHaus wrote: DatDude wrote: What Bochan Bird hates the eva community??

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Sep 30, 2007 10:15 am NAveryW wrote: According to Reichu, Bochan became frustrated after translating all the episode scripts and everyone just complained.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Sep 30, 2007 11:21 am CitizenGeek wrote: Kaworu was meant to be a catboy ... Asuka .. werewolf? What? Does what might have happenenend have any impact on Evangelion canon, really?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Sep 30, 2007 11:53 am I keep telling people to remember that but nooooooo

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Sep 30, 2007 12:00 pm From what I understand, the Kaworu/cat thing and most others were decided before the show actually began (hence Kaworu looking like his current version in the OP), but Anno's depression suffered a relapse halfway through the show, and the show's ending was changed. According to the Proposal, Seele was originally going to abandon the HIP to focus their resources on stopping the 12th/twelve Angel(s). Clearly, this didn't happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Sandoz » Sun Sep 30, 2007 12:55 pm NAveryW wrote: According to Reichu, Bochan became frustrated after translating all the episode scripts and everyone just complained.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Sun Sep 30, 2007 2:28 pm BrikHaus wrote: CitizenGeek wrote: Kaworu was meant to be a catboy ... Asuka .. werewolf? What? Does what might have happenenend have any impact on Evangelion canon, really?

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sun Sep 30, 2007 3:30 pm Interesting. Sometimes, when it comes to TV/Movies, I find what could have been to be just as interesting as the finished product.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Sep 30, 2007 3:42 pm So do I, which is also why I sometimes collect video game betas.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Sep 30, 2007 3:50 pm Yeah, I actually find the beta worlds to be some of the most interesting things about Ocarina of Time. As for Eva, this information makes me feel like there was "another" Evangelion out there that only moonspeakers know all that much about.
